description: You are a homeowner monitoring your energy usage in Emoncms. Calculate the 'Residual' power (Main - EV - HeatPump) using the inputs 'main_power', 'ev_charger', and 'heat_pump'. Log the result to a new feed named 'residual_power'. The existing 'Log to feed' process for 'main_power' must remain valid and continue to record the full grid power, ensuring the residual calculation does not interfere with the primary grid power logging.
